title: Closeout live plan retention

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Fix #969 so planning closeout cannot delete a live execplan when the retained archive is stale, missing, or not updated.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Preserve detailed execution records unless the user explicitly chooses discard-only closeout; use planning CLI surfaces for planning mutations; keep this slice to archive-plan/close-item retention behavior and tests.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Whether retained archives should be safely replaced or uniquely archived, provided closeout output clearly names the retention result and close-item blocks unsafe removal.
canonical_core.escalate_when: The fix requires redesigning closeout distillation broadly, changing unrelated archive semantics, or weakening proof that live plans are retained before removal.
canonical_core.next_action: Inspect archive-plan/close-item implementation and tests, implement the narrow retention guard, and prove stale archive/live plan scenarios.
completion_criteria: archive-plan --retain-archive updates/replaces or uniquely retains detailed plan content before allowing live plan removal.
close-item does not remove a live execplan when retained archive is stale or missing unless explicit discard-only behavior is present.
Issue #969 is closed only after focused and planning test/lint proof passes.

goal: Create a bounded plan for Closeout live plan retention.
non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

intent.outcome: Fix #969 so planning closeout cannot delete a live execplan when the retained archive is stale, missing, or not updated.
intent.constraints: Preserve detailed execution records unless the user explicitly chooses discard-only closeout; keep this slice to archive-plan/close-item retention behavior and tests.
intent.latitude: Choose safe replacement or unique archive behavior if the live plan is retained before removal and output names the result.
intent.escalation: Escalate when the fix requires broad closeout redesign or weakens detailed plan retention.

execution.next_step: Inspect archive-plan/close-item implementation and tests, implement the narrow retention guard, and prove stale archive/live plan scenarios.
execution.proof: Focused archive-plan/close-item regression tests plus make test-planning and make lint-planning.

invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Planning closeout must preserve detailed live execplan records unless explicitly discarded.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Fix #969 before returning to the codegen epic.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: archive-plan/close-item must not silently lose the latest detailed execplan when retained archive state is stale or missing.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Add retention semantics and regression coverage for stale/missing retained archives before close-item removes the live plan.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Confirm the scaffolded plan still matches the promoted item before broad implementation.

execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated backlog, adjacent modules, or canonical contracts not named by this plan.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Create a bounded plan for Closeout live plan retention.

execution_summary.validation confirmed: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_archive.py packages/planning/tests/test_close_item.py -q; make test-planning; make lint-planning

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.
closure_check.why this decision is honest: The bounded dogfooding issue acceptance is directly covered by behavior changes and focused regressions.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: installer.py retention logic plus test_archive.py and test_close_item.py stale archive scenarios
closure_check.reopen trigger: A retained archive conflict again causes live execplan loss or an unstated discard path.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, separate acted-on, reported-only/routed, and dismissed incidental findings; keep this compact and evidence-backed.
signals found: close-item could remove live execplan detail without retaining a fresh archive when a stale archive existed
signals fixed: #969 fixed by unique retained archive paths and retained close-item execplan closure

discard.summary: Command-by-command execution chronology is not needed after the regression and proof are recorded.
